Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
3.7.3 Hall Monitors - The temptation, the reality
(See also:
HELP
META
MONITORS
)
WHAT IS A
HALL
MONITOR
?
-----------------------
A hall monitor is someone
who
publicly reminds
others
not to misuse
some public
forum
, most often
MARKET
, but also others.
BUT BUT - SOMEBODY IS MISUSING MARKET (or
NEWBIE
, etc)
------------------------------------------------------
You hear someone who is not
buying
or
selling
on MARKET. He is breaking the
rules! (It could also be someone on NEWBIE who is not asking or answering a
question
about how to get along in
Achaea
). This is a great injustice, and you
alone are qualified to help! You must quickly call out on MARKET "Buying or
Selling only please" to protect the
world
.
No. No you mustn't.
HALL MONITORS DON'T HELP
------------------------
Speaking
out on-
channel
(for example, MARKET, whatever) has three problems:
- You are now giving attention to the person who's breaking the rules.
(and that is what the person wants)
- You are yourself violating the rules.
- You may be embarassing someone who really didn't know.
HOW TO DO IT RIGHT
------------------
Use private
communications
! Yes,
tells
or even
says
if you are close enough.
Be polite, and let it
go
- the job of enforcement belongs to the
Gods
and
Goddesses and
Administrators
of the lands.
WHOSE JOB IS IT?
----------------
All adventurers are welcome to help out, but in the end the job belongs to the
Immortals
of Achaea - Gods, Goddesses,
Celani
, and
Guides
. It's best to
leave
it to them whenever possible.
OTHER
PLACES TO
LOOK
FOR HELP
-----------------------------
HELP CHANNELS
- Lists the
channels
and the rules for their use.
HELP LANGUAGERULES
- About obscene, discriminatory or
hacker
language
.
HELP ROLEPLAYING
- The other "real" world has no place here.
HELP SPAMMING
- Repetition and empty communications: what not to do.
HELP HARASSMENT
- Very serious, and handled very seriously!
Please
ISSUE
for cases of
harassment
.
(See also: HELP META MONITORS)
